prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约9072名，2023年因断档跌至约63567名，2025年恢复至约30107名。近两年位次大幅波动后趋于稳定，2025年基准约30107名；该校在四川招生计划2022-2025年均为23人，2026年计划仍为23人，招生规模连续五年持平，无扩招或缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，军队医 学院校，软科主榜未进入前200名，学校层次在军事医学领域具有独特地位；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录。该校以临床医学、口腔医学等为特色，在军队医学领域具有较强实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、 口腔医学为高热推荐专业，护理学为推荐专业，药学、生物技术、生物医学工程等属生化环材大类，社会热度明显劝退。四川省2026年高考总人数约53.5万人，较2025年大幅增加；按历史比例估算物理类考生约32.9万人，较2025年物理类28.5万人增加约15.5%，竞争显著加剧。；该校位于陕西西安，在四川 招生计划稳定，无显著地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在2025年恢复至约30107名、招生计划连续五年持平、四川省2026年物理类考生大幅增加约15.5%等因素，20 26年报考竞争将有所加剧，位次预计小幅后移。预测最低位次约30707名，区间30207-31207名。

- 口腔医学（无军籍地方生）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 生物技术（无军籍地方生）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间30207-31207名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档临床医学和口腔医学可作为冲刺目标（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档护理学作为保底选择。该校为 军事医学院校，报考时需注意无军籍地方生的招生条件（仅招收普通高中应届毕业生，政治面貌须为共青团员或中共党员）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2022 was approximately 9072, dropped sharply to about 63567 in 2023 due to a gap, and recovered to around 30107 in 2025. After significant fluctuations in the past two years, it has stabilized, with a baseline of about 30107 in 2025; the enrollment plan in Sichuan from 2022 to 2025 was 23 students each year, and the 2026 plan remains 23, with the enrollment scale unchanged for five consecutive years, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, a military medical college, not ranked in the top 200 on the Soft Science main list, with a unique position in the military medical field; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of gaps in admissions. It features clinical medicine, stomatology, etc., and has strong strength in the military medical field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine and stomatology are highly recommended majors, nursing is a recommended major, while pharmacy, biotechnology, biomedical engineering, etc., belong to the broader categories of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, with significantly low social popularity. The total number of Sichuan Gaokao examinees in 2026 is about 535,000, a substantial increase from 2025; estimated physics category examinees are about 329,000, an increase of about 15.5% from 285,000 in 2025, leading to significantly intensified competition. The university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, with a stable enrollment plan in Sichuan and no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the historical ranking recovering to about 30107 in 2025, the enrollment plan unchanged for five consecutive years, and a significant increase of about 15.5% in physics category examinees in Sichuan in 2026, competition for admission in 2026 will intensify, and the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted lowest ranking is about 30707, with a range of 30207-31207.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 30207-31207, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 clinical medicine and stomatology as reach goals (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower end of the range), and Tier 3 nursing as a safety choice. This university is a military medical college; applicants should note the admission conditions for non-military local students (only recruiting regular high school fresh graduates, with political status required to be Communist Youth League members or Communist Party members).
